notes: Runtime-test-backed HAR-306 fixture for product-backed inventory shipment staging. Live 2025-01 schema introspection confirmed the shipment root fields, mutation argument names, payload field names, and status enum; the checked-in integration test enforces local create/createInTransit, add/remove/update item, set tracking, mark in transit, receive, delete, downstream inventory quantity effects, validation guardrails, no upstream writes, and original raw mutation log order. Transfer/movement routing remains documented as an opaque blocker until a dedicated transfer state model exists.
